title: Embedded Reliability Event (core layer)
description: One row per event. Layer 1 (core, device-agnostic) is defined here and should be reused verbatim. Layer 2 (device-specific fields like command_id/slot_id/zone_id) is allowed via additionalProperties and is your own to define.

timestamp.description: Single-unit: boot-relative millis. Fleet: MUST be alignable absolute time (epoch ms / RTC / NTP). Relative time makes cross-fleet comparison meaningless.

machine_id.description: Unique unit id, fixed format, from unit #1 (e.g. EDEN001).

firmware_version.description: Compile-time build version, carried on every row.

event_type.description: What happened. Must come from your EventType registry — no bare strings.

duration_ms.description: Measured duration, never a computed value.

result.description: Kept orthogonal to event_type and error_code.

error_code.description: Failure reason from your ErrorCode registry; NONE on success.
